title: 7 Best ConvertKit Alternatives in 2025 (Free & Paid)
meta_description: Find the best ConvertKit alternatives for creators, bloggers & course sellers. Compare free and paid email marketing platforms.
h1: Best ConvertKit Alternatives for Creators & Bloggers
intro: While ConvertKit excels at serving creators, its pricing and feature set may not suit everyone's needs. Whether you're looking for more affordable options, specialized features, or different pricing models, several strong alternatives offer competitive email marketing capabilities tailored to different creator types and budgets.
why_switch: Lower pricing tiers starting from as little as $9/month compared to ConvertKit's $29 entry point
Specialized features for specific creator types, such as newsletter monetization, e-commerce integration, or webinar hosting
Different free tier limits—some offering up to 100,000 free subscribers versus ConvertKit's 1,000

alternatives.name: Beehiiv
alternatives.tagline: The newsletter platform built for growth
alternatives.key_difference: Beehiiv stands out with built-in newsletter monetization, an ad network, and referral program features specifically designed for publishers. With a generous 2,500 subscriber free tier and strong Trustpilot ratings (4.4), it's ideal for creators focused on building sustainable newsletter businesses.

alternatives.name: MailerLite
alternatives.tagline: Simple email marketing for small businesses
alternatives.best_for: Small businesses and freelancers on a budget
alternatives.key_difference: MailerLite offers an unbeatable entry price starting at just $9/month with a full feature set including automation, landing pages, and pop-ups. It combines affordability with excellent user reviews (4.5 Trustpilot rating), making it perfect for budget-conscious creators.

alternatives.name: Mailchimp
alternatives.key_difference: Mailchimp is one of the most established platforms with a robust free tier and starting paid plans at $13/month. Its simplicity and extensive integrations make it ideal for creators transitioning from free tools who need straightforward email marketing without advanced features.

alternatives.name: ActiveCampaign
alternatives.best_for: Businesses needing advanced automation and CRM
alternatives.key_difference: ActiveCampaign combines email marketing with a full CRM system, lead scoring, and site tracking starting at $15/month. It's the best choice for creators who need sophisticated automation workflows and customer relationship management beyond basic email capabilities.

alternatives.name: GetResponse
alternatives.best_for: Online course creators and webinar hosts
alternatives.key_difference: GetResponse uniquely bundles webinar hosting, online course creation, and email marketing into one platform starting at $19/month. For course creators and educators, this integrated approach eliminates the need for multiple tool subscriptions.

alternatives.name: Brevo
alternatives.key_difference: Brevo offers the largest free tier with 100,000 free subscribers and includes SMS, WhatsApp, and live chat alongside email. It's perfect for creators wanting to build a comprehensive communication platform beyond email marketing alone.

alternatives.name: Klaviyo
alternatives.tagline: The platform for intelligent marketing automation
alternatives.best_for: E-commerce brands on Shopify or WooCommerce
alternatives.key_difference: Klaviyo specializes in e-commerce with native Shopify/WooCommerce integration, predictive analytics, and review management features. If you're a creator selling physical or digital products, Klaviyo's e-commerce focus provides superior functionality.

faq.q: What is the best free alternative to ConvertKit?
faq.a: Brevo offers the most generous free tier with up to 100,000 subscribers, compared to ConvertKit's 1,000. Mailchimp and MailerLite also provide excellent free options with 500 and 1,000 subscribers respectively. However, if you need stronger free features specifically for newsletters, Beehiiv allows 2,500 free subscribers.

faq.q: What is the best ConvertKit alternative for small business?
faq.a: MailerLite is ideal for small businesses due to its low $9/month starting price, intuitive interface, and strong feature set including automation and landing pages. Mailchimp is another excellent choice with its established reputation and extensive integrations. Both offer superior value for small teams with limited budgets compared to ConvertKit.

faq.q: Is there a cheaper alternative to ConvertKit?
faq.a: Yes, MailerLite ($9/month), Mailchimp ($13/month), and ActiveCampaign ($15/month) all offer lower starting prices than ConvertKit's $29/month. GetResponse at $19/month adds webinar functionality for just $10 less. For the most budget-conscious creators, both Mailchimp and MailerLite provide solid free tiers that may eliminate the need for paid plans initially.
